provenance.source: Synthetic fixture -- the Meridian Tapes universe, an entirely fictional catalog invented for this repository, for tests only. The real Connection Guesser pool is generated separately (networked-players-catalog build-connection-rounds) and published at public/data/game/*.json.
provenance.license: Fictional synthetic data authored in this repository; no external source, no real artists, releases, or Discogs identifiers
provenance.note: Rounds are regenerated deterministically by apps/web/scripts/build-rounds.mjs; every distractor is validated to NOT satisfy the connection. Never presented as real catalog data, and never published outside this test fixture.

clues.text: The records are from 1974 and 1975.
The connecting credit is engineer work.
Their initials are H. M.
Liner note, Late Ferry: "Engineer — ▮▮▮▮▮▮"
Two names struck from the tray.
